name: Carly Holdings Limited
summary: Carly Holdings Limited, an online technology company, provides car subscription services for individuals and businesses in Australia and New Zealand. It operates Carly.co, a car subscription offering; and DriveMyCar.com.au, a peer-to-peer car rental service. The company was formerly known as Collaborate Corporation Limited and changed its name to Carly Holdings Limited in December 2020. Carly Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
